root.rep_text: รายการประจำวัน (A3)

combo.doc_type: select DOC_TYPE as item_code , DOC_NAME as item_desc from sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type order by DOC_TYPE desc

root.sql:
select sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type , sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_name, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no, pka_acc.fp_format_docno(sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no) as from_doc_no, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id, substr(sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no,0,2)||'-'||substr(sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no,3,6)||'-'||substr(sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no,9,3) as doc_no_1, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.sequence_no, pka_acc.fp_format_account(sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id) as account_id , CASE WHEN sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount = 0 THEN ' ' ELSE ' ' END || sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as account_name, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.description , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.desc_journal_detail as desc_journal_detail , sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount
from sc_acc_journal_heading_firm, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm, sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_com_m_branch , sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type where sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.entry_br_id and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_type and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status ='0' and sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.nature = 'CR' --and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date = '29/12/2017' --and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id = '01' --and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = 'RV' --and sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no = 'RV601229022' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no, sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.sequence_no
